---
applyTo: "data/work.data.md"
---

# work.data.md instructions

This file lists professional work experiences.

## Schema

One `##` section per engagement, most recent first. Each section must contain, in this order:

- `Period` — `MMM YYYY – MMM YYYY` or `MMM YYYY – Present`.
- `Client/Company` — name of the company or client engagement.
- `Role summary` — one to three sentences describing the role and the work performed.
- `Skills and technologies` — comma-separated list of relevant technologies, methodologies, and soft skills applied or acquired during the engagement.

## Rules

- Split concurrent engagements at the same company into separate entries when the project, client, or role differs.
- Do not include confidential client details beyond what is public in the CV.
- Keep descriptions factual, short, and in English.
- Preserve company names as written.
- Use the `contribute-data` skill to append or update entries.
